cclogistics:logistics_coordinator.job.de: The Logistics Coordinator stands at the Town Hall and relays colony requests to the Logistics network.
cclogistics:packer_agent.job.desc: The Packer Agent moves items between the Freight Depot and the Warehouse, boxing and unboxing them.
cclogistics:freight_inspector.job.desc: The Freight Inspector monitors incoming and outgoing logistics tasks.
cclogistics:cclogistics_coordinator.skil: Benefits from high Intelligence and Athletics to process requests faster.
cclogistics:packer_agent.skills.desc: Benefits from high Athletics and Strength to move packages quickly.
cclogistics:freight_inspector.skills.des: Benefits from high Intelligence to accurately inspect manifests.
